overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars video game showing a character exploring a snowy mountain village. The character walks through narrow stone corridors, open snowy plazas with a distinctive circular building, and reaches an elevated overlook with a panoramic view of the settlement. The environment features falling snow, stone and wood architecture, and scattered NPCs.

events.description: exits narrow covered walkway into open snowy terrace

lit lantern mounted on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow stone corridor with metal railings and wooden scaffolding visible ahead. A lone NPC stands by the railing in the distance. Around the 10-second mark, the passage opens into a snowy terrace area.

events.description: descends gentle slope toward frozen pond area

agents.ego_description: walking across open snowy terrain toward a large circular building

snow-covered ice formation reflecting the gray sky
large boulder covered in snow and ice
tall stone support pillar with lantern

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide snowy plaza with a prominent circular building visible in the distance. The character walks across snow-covered ground with frozen water features and rock formations, descending slightly toward the center of the open area.

segments.scene_description: The character passes under a stone archway into a village area with wooden buildings and hanging lanterns. An NPC stands guard near the entrance. The path winds through snow piles and stone walls with warm light emanating from building windows.

resumes walking along the overlook path

segments.scene_description: The character reaches an elevated overlook with metal railings and a yellow warning sign, revealing a stunning panoramic vista of the snow-covered village below. The character pauses to observe the view where an NPC stands at the railing, then continues walking along the overlook path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow path along cliff edge with stone buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the overlook path past stone buildings and industrial pipes

entered.detail: rough stone wall of building with carved circular symbol
industrial metal pipes and machinery against the wall
large wooden door with metal studs
lit lantern on post illuminating the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow path beside stone buildings featuring industrial metal pipes and a large wooden door. A lantern provides warm light against the cool snowy environment as the path continues along the cliff edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the confines of a narrow stone corridor into a sweeping panoramic view of a snowy mountain village. It begins by moving through a tight passage with metal railings and wooden scaffolding before the space opens onto a wide, snow-covered plaza featuring frozen water and a prominent circular building. The camera then passes under a stone archway, shifting from the open plaza into a cozy village area characterized by wooden buildings, hanging lanterns, and warm light spilling from windows. As the path ascends, the scene expands into an elevated overlook with metal railings and warning signs, revealing a stunning vista of the settlement below. Finally, the movement continues along a narrow cliffside path, passing industrial pipes and large wooden doors illuminated by the soft glow of a lantern against the cool winter environment.
